title: Noragami
description:
Noragami is a supernatural action anime that follows Yato, a wandering minor god who dreams of becoming one of the most famous deities in Japan. Despite calling himself a god, Yato lives a poor and lonely life, accepting tiny jobs for only five yen in hopes of gaining followers and building a shrine of his own someday.His ordinary routine changes when a kind-hearted middle school girl named Hiyori Iki saves him from an accident and unexpectedly becomes connected to the spirit world. Because of this strange event, Hiyori begins drifting between the human world and the realm of spirits. 

Alongside Yukine, a troubled young spirit who becomes Yato’s sacred weapon, the trio faces dangerous phantoms, powerful gods, and painful memories hidden deep within Yato’s mysterious past. The anime masterfully blends humor, emotional storytelling, intense action scenes, and heartfelt character development. Beneath its comedy and supernatural battles lies a touching story about loneliness, friendship, purpose, and the desire to be remembered by others.Noragami is highly praised for its stylish animation by Studio Bones, memorable soundtrack, lovable characters, and the perfect balance between lighthearted moments and dark emotional themes that keep viewers deeply connected to the story from beginning to end.
